channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Good Weekend Offers Educational Quizzes and Puzzles for Readers
item.description: The article promotes a range of interactive content features available to subscribers of The Sydney Morning Herald and The Age. It highlights the 'Mini Crossword' puzzle, which presents ten clues acro...

item.title: Film 'Satluj' sparks debate on historical accuracy and Punjab politics
item.description: The news article discusses the release of the film 'Satluj,' directed by Amit Rai, which has sparked controversy over its portrayal of events in Jammu and Kashmir. The film's narrative has been compar...

item.title: Chantelle Kiprono Attends State House Meeting with Mother Zipporah Kittony
item.description: Chantelle Kiprono, daughter of veteran women's rights advocate Zipporah Kittony, made headlines as she joined her mother at a high-profile visit to State House hosted by First Lady Rachel Ruto. The ev...

item.title: Former AJK PM Tanveer Ilyas's security guard killed in Poonch district attack, JAAC accused
item.description: A personal security guard of former Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) prime minister Sardar Tanveer Ilyas was shot dead on Friday after his convoy came under fire in Poonch district. The attack occurred ne...

item.title: UEFA Clarifies VAR Guidelines On Mistaken Identity And Simulation
item.description: UEFA has clarified its stance on VAR reviews, stating that the new mistaken identity law won't be used to punish diving or simulation. The decision comes after concerns about how the VAR protocol was ...

item.title: Education's Role in Addressing Societal Challenges
item.description: President of Zanzibar, Dr Hussein Mwinyi, emphasized during the 63rd convocation ceremony of IIT Madras that education should be a tool for societal transformation, not just employment preparation. He...

item.title: Midsayap councilor killed in shooting linked to peacebuilding efforts
item.description: A municipal councilor in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) was killed in a shooting incident in Cotabato province. Nasser Alipolo Dalandang, a member of the Sangguniang Bayan...

item.title: Friends say Meghan was disappointed after security disputes overshadowed the Sussex family's UK visit
item.description: According to sources quoted by People magazine, friends of the Duchess of Sussex said Meghan Markle felt humiliated and deeply saddened after a planned family visit to the United Kingdom was overshado...

item.title: Candid Coffees Unveils Menu Highlights at SM North EDSA Location
item.description: The article discusses the recent opening of Candid Coffees' new branch in SM North EDSA, highlighting its menu offerings and customer experience. The location, part of a growing chain known for its qu...

item.title: Bonnie Tyler's Funeral Plans Announced as Fans to Line Streets for Tribute
item.description: The funeral arrangements for Welsh singer Bonnie Tyler have been announced, with a celebration of her life and a procession planned in Swansea following her unexpected death on 8 July at the age of 75...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Invites UDA Candidate to Join DCP After Ol Kalou By-Election Victory
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua, leader of the Democracy for Citizens Party (DCP), has publicly invited Samuel Muchina Nyagah, the UDA candidate who lost the Ol Kalou by-election, to defect to his party. Gachagua hi...

item.title: Expensive workout suit's claims under scrutiny as experts question effectiveness
item.description: The article discusses a high-end $4000 suit marketed as a revolutionary fitness tool, promising a two-hour workout in just 20 minutes. Endorsed by celebrities like Cindy Crawford and George Clooney, t...

item.title: NECO Clarifies Kogi School Not a Miracle Centre Amid Security Concerns
item.description: The National Examinations Council (NECO) has officially denied claims that the Government Secondary School, Olowa, in Kogi State, where five people were abducted, is a 'miracle centre'. In a statement...

item.title: Oil Prices Rise Amid U.S.-Iran Tensions and Red Sea Closure Threats
item.description: Global oil prices surged over 2% on Friday as tensions between the U.S. and Iran escalated, with fears of a potential Red Sea closure adding to market volatility. Brent crude futures climbed $1.77 to ...

item.title: Peace Agreement Implementation Faces Security Coordination Challenges
item.description: Security officials overseeing a peace agreement have issued a joint statement addressing recent developments, though specifics remain under observation by international monitors. The Joint Security Co...

item.title: PM Modi says railway electrification helped India withstand global energy disruptions amid the Hormuz crisis
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi said that the large-scale electrification of Indian Railways over the past 12 years has strengthened India's ability to cope with global energy disruptions arising from th...

item.title: General Compute secures $400M loan using inference chips as collateral
item.description: General Compute, an AI inference cloud startup, has secured a $400 million loan from Upper90, marking the first deal to use inference-specific chips as collateral. This move reflects growing market in...

item.title: Texas flash floods kill two, rescue efforts continue as region faces historic water levels
item.description: Catastrophic flash floods in Texas have claimed two lives and prompted hundreds of rescues in areas still recovering from last year's devastation. Governor Greg Abbott reported that over 200 people we...

item.title: PPP chairman pledges political dialogue for AJK governance and rights
item.description: PPP Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari began his election campaign in Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK), vowing to bridge the gap between the region's people and federal authorities. Addressing a rally, he cr...

item.title: San Francisco Orders Tech Giants to Remove AI Nudification Apps
item.description: San Francisco has issued cease-and-desist letters to Apple and Google, demanding the removal of AI-powered apps that generate nonconsensual nude images. The city’s attorney alleges these applications ...
